chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 599 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.3602/2018 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 12.03.2019 Petitioner Nazir Ahmed in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, AAG Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<<< It is stated by the petitioner that he lodged an FIR Crime No.203/2017 u/s 365-A and 343 PPC with P.S Meharbpur, it has been cancelled by the police under ‘B’ class without lawful justification. By contending so, he sought for Judicial Inquiry of the incident. 2. On being asked whether he has impugned the order of cancellation of his FIR? Answer to it, which was made by the petitioner was in affirmative. 3. After cancellation of the FIR of the incident, the Judicial Inquiry is not called for. Instant Constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
